entries.gt_005b9a74f2a8a1: sends an on-screen impulse through the NET
entries.gt_0069f418c1b6a4: can lead to a stash or someone else's door
entries.gt_00fb5849e5eb45: return to a familiar hermodoor, not a pretty corridor
entries.gt_011fa5047fa9fe: Before a long sortie, free space in your bag. A rare sample in hand is worse than ordinary water at home.
entries.gt_0275e47a15b169: Bait works better when you already know where the beast will run.
entries.gt_02a62358726e7f: put it by a lift, hermodoor, or clean corridor
entries.gt_02eb760ce60de1: sparing an infected host without control means giving the body a second owner
entries.gt_036dce0f1ee2d2: check the desk after the door, not instead of the door
entries.gt_03f2cebb93ed7c: a wet line makes the eel faster than you
entries.gt_04c90a6f37b8f3: watch food, water, metal, and paper events
entries.gt_04f21cf6e5e54d: NET guns and Safeguards are not for a household raid
entries.gt_0500e966d7f460: A caravan line feeds the market. If you rob a water delivery, do not be surprised by a dry shelf later.
entries.gt_051a93bbd3ffef: check the door, light, and exit before you need them
entries.gt_059bc7ccfc9e9f: after it, check the filter, water, and dry route
entries.gt_05fa18bdd11647: salt does not heal a wound already taken
entries.gt_061c38b6d0cad1: a forgery without a sales plan is just contraband
entries.gt_0673dee2e52a2a: at the medpost, antibiotics are asked for by need, not by mood
entries.gt_06df93a21b2ba6: bring bread, tinned stew, or water when asked, not at random
entries.gt_06f5071f6eb81d: do not trust a strange command without a source; hit the carrier and get NPCs out
entries.gt_0712acd95c8599: take a dry route, a harpoon, or a strong ranged hit
entries.gt_075b9f7e05f1d7: after the automaton, check the pipe and pressure, but not with your hands
entries.gt_0799e187628e26: its things are often useful, but witnesses like the word theft
entries.gt_07f8b3ec30cb0c: spend an energy cell on a target worth that price
entries.gt_088688ef95af15: address, surname, and case number may not match
entries.gt_09ac07dfe67722: after the dogs, check the door: wet paws often lead to a second entrance
entries.gt_09b2e4eee4cffa: after the crackler, check the wall and HP, then reload
entries.gt_0a607010bd3574: bring clearance, a clean stamp, and free hands
entries.gt_0af698ffacb56d: contraband can be sold, turned in, or lost together with reputation
entries.gt_0b32d6842809cd: contraband can be sold, turned in, or thrown as a distraction
entries.gt_0b8048cd32bab5: cheap directed strike for a narrow passage
entries.gt_0b93d857683984: shows the lunge before the hit
entries.gt_0c2fc913705b19: assuming neutral means safe is expensive in GIGAHRUSH
entries.gt_0c4f0a67ccd0cf: spread is wide; the distant target laughs first
entries.gt_0c511c372845ab: children and pilgrims trade it more readily than the market
entries.gt_0c540d2ef0b836: the NII pays for the sample, not for a stain on your sleeve
entries.gt_0c5e46d8eae563: bring salt, ointment, and a dry exit
entries.gt_0c6f5371bed118: takes HP; do not eat before a fight
entries.gt_0cec3702e203c0: take it where there is room to swing
entries.gt_0d41b42508aead: does not solve an armored problem by itself
entries.gt_0dba15677e98fe: after an unperson, ask witnesses who saw it before the transformation
entries.gt_0dc172df00dad6: listening to the choir to the end helps only her
entries.gt_0dd40af13c6ac3: Do not stand on a fog cell and do not heal there. First a clean step, then the bandage.
entries.gt_0e110ec98e1001: stops a close target and a crowd in doorways
entries.gt_0eb80533b8abad: do not place it near needed forms and allies
entries.gt_0faea16418cd47: better check the tag before the siren
entries.gt_0fcc3fa8f7c43c: hold the corner, leave the fog, and hit the real body
entries.gt_103e7d7e5d6e07: unsealed sand spoils food and documents
entries.gt_10488f2a714fed: after the swarm, check the ventilation, crack, and nearest hermodoor
entries.gt_105b537d1d5017: reload is long; a miss opens your account
entries.gt_117c7fadd10967: hacking without a retreat turns the console into a trap
entries.gt_11e1092f4be7be: heals a little and helps you reach the medpost
entries.gt_127024649330d8: an automatic weapon does not recognize this paper
entries.gt_132cbe6115c0b2: a slimevik can give a trade, a rumor, or a problem with a contact sample
entries.gt_1338f74aa49354: before a raid, check pipe durability, not only cartridges
entries.gt_13745c6223a1eb: the duty officer often gives up a rumor faster for coffee
entries.gt_1417e8e0c0fb6e: ${tool.name}: first check the task, reserves, and retreat route.
entries.gt_147fd57ae15d54: cuts what bullets do not take
entries.gt_153b374818e957: near the kitchen, kompot trades better than small rubles
entries.gt_156c991dd80180: do not show the ampoule to every patrol
entries.gt_15bd6db6c9b1c9: a mark among enemies will not become safe later
entries.gt_15d7bb5469b018: carry the red sample to the NII sealed
entries.gt_164835fdbda225: a chain poorly forgives a tight corner
entries.gt_166047cc300cbc: after the deprived one, check the battery, mark, and door back
entries.gt_16a5d65aeab2a6: a pocket with food calls it closer than conversation
entries.gt_173d4e3a08bb46: fire in short bursts, especially near allies
entries.gt_17744a4a9dceae: Samosbor almost never gives a long pause
entries.gt_17770f130cbd71: bring metal, water, filters, or the required reagent for the task
entries.gt_1778ce67dc1caf: bring clean sheets and watch the witnesses
entries.gt_17f5d2db47519a: after a fight with a patrol, look for witnesses: reputation falls faster than HP
entries.gt_1836fe37ac4089: do not stand near the target and check allies
entries.gt_183a92acd14bff: keep a flashlight, battery, and retreat corner
entries.gt_187b2259e42ead: bring a sanitary kit and official clearance
entries.gt_050b213167d15f: Technical pump passport. Needed for repair, a report, or an argument with the post.
entries.gt_05f6504e3a0fd1: Thin shaving after the green incident. Valuable sample, contraband, and evidence: scientists pay, cultists pray, the Ministry opens a file on the owner.
entries.gt_0842dd0c39e265: Gray dry residue after the furnace. It no longer reaches for fingers, but an act is still required.
entries.gt_0d6af612a615bb: Small part between light and fire.
entries.gt_0da8d7c2627709: Debt in someone else's handwriting. Can be turned in to the building manager, cashed with debtors, or hidden until inspection.
entries.gt_0f12dcc5e11632: Single-use order for ten 9mm rounds. After redemption, only a record in the cabinet remains.
entries.gt_0fcf561b107867: Food that got white sand in it. Edibility remains only formal.
entries.gt_0fd0065cc97069: Bread, keys, surnames, and arrows to other people's pots. The evidence smells of boiling water.
entries.gt_117017b4bf2672: Wooden stock for a homemade weapon. Helps hold recoil with the shoulder.
entries.gt_12326b2e54ab37: Service token with squad number. At a post it is recognized faster than a surname.
entries.gt_146cd75347b32a: Rough single-shot homemade gun. Damage 21. Heavy spread. 9mm
entries.gt_14c2f04052bf74: Wet scale from a water route. May be fake, but the market pays for rarity.
entries.gt_14e441496829c8: Tube of gray compound for gaps, pipes, and blind decisions. On Heatline Zero, spent during repairs.
entries.gt_16d0899764f66c: Election ballot. The check mark is already placed, but the queue is still required.
entries.gt_17e9ea79a47b1d: Dry gas-mask filter. Replace a wet filter immediately.
entries.gt_1a041730ac70b3: Uneven receipt for a transparent sample. Cabinet number and someone else's stamp work as evidence.
entries.gt_1b1f038658e906: Fits a specific door. Check the door before running to it during the siren
entries.gt_1bf746d54eaa9e: Sticky red sample for traps, solvents, and bad service ideas.
entries.gt_1f151e4bdfe8be: Intact lamp for a flashlight, panel, or trade with an electrician.
entries.gt_2160e11646ada4: Looks like clearance for the card archive, but the ink was dried too fast. Opens weak posts and invites a strong audit.
entries.gt_238c1faa2aaa19: Sealed transparent NII sample with a silver rim. Valuable exactly while unopened; E - open and try it at your own expense.
entries.gt_27df882908c425: Chair from assembly-hall hell. Damage 18. Fragile wide stopper. Durability 22
entries.gt_292c17d66553a4: Audit act: sealed samples left the NII as written-off containers and surfaced with market middlemen.
entries.gt_2aa06207c20e9f: The certificate permits breathing in the queue.
entries.gt_2b9416d2526269: Heavy parcel with market thread and someone else's seal. Inside smells of cheap forgetting; the address matters more than the contents.
entries.gt_2c231004a0dab3: Corrected list after Istotit. The extra surnames look livelier than the real ones.
entries.gt_2c2dbb56b7dbed: Warm red mold from a root den. The NII and market pay, but witnesses call it infection.
entries.gt_2cb124cbcf7f51: Flat metal for repair, barricade, or protection from one strong hit.
entries.gt_2cb33991602054: Receipt for gas-mask filter issue. At the warehouse, it may be accepted instead of rubles.
entries.gt_2d3b289a95d597: Longest melee reach. Damage 18. Keeps the beast at arm's length. Durability 80
entries.gt_2e14662ef5ca5c: Damp rot for shelving. Smells of collectors and dinner.
entries.gt_2edd75b567b619: Black ink for a white lie.
entries.gt_2f6e2cdab36b01: Shimmering dust from under an old stamp. At the NII they collect it with a spatula, not by breathing.
entries.gt_2fb2d2f8c3d6af: Fast shadow puncture: 10 PSI, 38 damage. In the log it passes as directed risk.
entries.gt_2fd16558d6fa28: Someone's note: stash, complaint, address, or warning
entries.gt_326c8a84f62273: Heavy organic projectile: 11 PSI, 42 damage. Wash the container with iodine after carrying.
entries.gt_32ddb30f3e90f5: Focused PSI beam: 12 PSI per impulse, 26 line damage. Hold it like a cutting tool.
entries.gt_350a25c105a75b: Service pass to the district council archive shelves. Works more quietly if you do not ask who signed it.
entries.gt_377011bdde04d6: Unstable rupture clot: 8 PSI, 22 area damage. Works as an emergency charge.
entries.gt_389aa51a398dfa: Gray material for a filter or bandage.
entries.gt_3a424e448d2786: Proves the archive lost the evidence.
entries.gt_3a53eeb7d511af: Small mirror for checking a corner, pipe, or crack before entry.
entries.gt_3b6aab3996792e: Liquidator warrant for someone else's paper, safe, or inspection of the owner. You can present it, forge an alibi around it, or sell it more dangerously than money.
entries.gt_3e08c1ce373c72: Precise laboratory impulse: 20 PSI, 90 damage. Save it for a strong single target.
entries.gt_3e91eedeeaf255: Zones are marked in red pencil.
entries.gt_3eccfdbaae26f1: Glitched behavioral impulse: 9 PSI, target attacks nearest targets for 15s. Explanations are not accepted afterward.
entries.gt_3f172503974aea: Temporary pass with expired date. At a weak post it may still work.
